hero.title: Henna By Hanazz
hero.subtitle: 100% natural henna artistry in the heart of Barcelona. Pakistani, Arabic, Indian & fusion styles — for brides, events and private sessions.

about.title: Henna mastery, Barcelona soul
about.p1: Hanazz is a professional henna artist based in Barcelona, bringing expertise across Pakistani, Arabic, Indian and fusion styles. With a commitment to 100% natural, PPD-free henna, every design is safe, stunning and deeply personal.
about.p2: From bridal mehndi for destination weddings to intimate private sessions and large-scale celebrations, Hanazz works with each client to create something uniquely theirs.
about.quote: "Every line tells a story. My job is to make yours beautiful."

services.title: Henna for every occasion
services.subtitle: Each design is custom-created. Pricing depends on design complexity, size and location — contact us for a personalised quote.

bridal.title: Bridal Henna
bridal.description: Intricate, bespoke bridal mehndi for your most important day. Arabic, Pakistani, Indian or fusion styles.

events.title: Events & Parties
events.description: Live henna stations for weddings, cultural events, corporate gatherings and celebrations of all sizes.

private.title: Private Sessions
private.description: A calm, personalised henna experience at our Barcelona studio or at your home.

workshops.title: Workshops
workshops.description: Learn the art of henna. Group or private workshops for all levels.

gallery.title: Our Work
gallery.subtitle: Every design is unique. Browse a selection of recent work.

testimonials.title: What our clients say

t1.text: Hanazz made my bridal henna absolutely beautiful. The design was exactly what I wanted and she was so professional throughout.
t1.name: Sarah M.

t2.text: We hired Hanazz for our wedding guests and everyone loved it. She was fast, gentle and the designs were stunning.
t2.name: Amira K.

t3.text: The workshop was incredible. Hanazz is a patient teacher and I learned so much in just one session.
t3.name: Laura R.

testimonials.note: More reviews coming soon. Be the first to leave yours!

q1.q: What styles of henna do you offer?
q1.a: I specialise in Pakistani, Arabic, Indian and fusion styles. Every design is custom-created based on your preference and the style that suits you best.

q2.a: Absolutely. I use 100% natural henna with no PPD, no chemicals and no additives. It's safe for all skin types.

q3.q: Do you travel to the client?
q3.a: Yes, I offer home service throughout Barcelona and the surrounding area. I also travel for destination weddings.

q4.q: How far in advance should I book bridal henna?
q4.a: I recommend booking at least 2-3 months in advance for bridal work, especially during wedding season.

q5.q: Do you offer henna for events?
q5.a: Yes, I provide live henna stations for weddings, parties, corporate events and cultural celebrations.

q6.q: How do I book and pay?
q6.a: You can book directly via WhatsApp. Payment can be made via Bizum, bank transfer or cash.

cta_section.title: Ready to create something beautiful?
cta_section.subtitle: Get in touch for a personalised quote or to check availability.
